oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Spix’s Macaw
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Marshall, Tom
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 47 Number 1 (December 2020).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.A Bird in the Hand is Worth Two in the
